# Vagabond Modding API

Static class: `Vagabond.Common.Api.Api` (in `Vagabond.Common.dll`).    
**Disclaimer:** Documentation generated by an LLM.

## Setup

1. Reference `Vagabond.Common.dll`.
2. Make your mod load **after** Vagabond's `PreSptModLoader` phase, otherwise calls throw `InvalidOperationException`.
3. Do **NOT** include a copy of the `Vagabond.Common.dll` with your mod.

```csharp
// "+2" places your mod after Vagabond (which sits at +1)
[Injectable(TypePriority = OnLoadOrder.PostDBModLoader + 2)]
public sealed class MyModLoader : IOnLoad { ... }
```

Full working sample: [example-api-usage/VagabondApiExample.cs](../example-api-usage/VagabondApiExample.cs).

---

## Exfils

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `void AddExfils(RaidLocation raid, List<CustomExfil> transits, List<CustomExfil> extracts)` | Add or replace custom exfils on a raid. Existing entries with the same `Identifier` are overwritten. |
| `bool RemoveExfil(RaidLocation raid, string identifier)` | Remove a custom exfil by `Identifier`. Returns `true` if anything was removed. |
| `IReadOnlyList<CustomExfil> GetExfils(RaidLocation raid)` | Current list of custom exfils registered for a raid. |

```csharp
var extract = new CustomExfil
{
    Identifier   = "MYMOD_EXT_FENCE",
    DisplayName  = "Fence's Woods Hideout",
    Side         = "Pmc",
    ExfiltrationTime = 20f,
    X = -211.918f, Y = 76.064f, Z = -269.262f,
    RotationY = 161.529f,
};

var transit = new CustomExfil
{
    Identifier          = "MYMOD_WOODS_TO_GZ",
    IsTransit           = true,
    DestinationLocation = VagabondLocations.RaidLocationToMapName(RaidLocation.GroundZero),
    Description         = "Transit to Ground Zero",
    ExfiltrationTime    = 15f,
    X = -178.181f, Y = 58.151f, Z = -306.06f, RotationY = 194.459f,
};

Api.AddExfils(RaidLocation.Woods, [transit], [extract]);
```

---

## Trader Locations

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `void AddTraderLocations(List<TraderLocation> extractions)` | Add or replace trader locations. Entries with a matching `ExfilIdentifier` replace existing ones. |
| `bool RemoveTraderExtraction(string exitName)` | Remove a trader location by `ExfilIdentifier`. Returns `true` if removed. |
| `IReadOnlyList<TraderLocation> GetTraderExtractions()` | All currently registered trader locations. |

```csharp
Api.AddTraderLocations([
    new TraderLocation
    {
        TraderId        = "579dc571d53a0658a154fbec", // Fence
        Raid            = RaidLocation.Woods,
        ExfilIdentifier = "MYMOD_EXT_FENCE",
    },
]);
```

---

## Hideout Traders

Adds traders that should be available when the player is **inside their own hideout** (`LastExit == VGB_HO_<own id>`). Stored on the profile's Vagabond state. Has no effect at any other exfil.

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `void AddHideoutTraders(string sessionId, List<string> traderIds)` | Add trader ids to the player's hideout-trader set. Persists immediately. |
| `bool RemoveHideoutTraders(string sessionId, List<string> traderIds)` | Remove ids. Returns `true` if at least one id was removed. |
| `IReadOnlyCollection<string> GetHideoutTraders(string sessionId)` | Current set of ids. Empty array if none / unknown session. |

```csharp
Api.AddHideoutTraders(sessionId, ["<trader mongo id>"]);
// list:    Api.GetHideoutTraders(sessionId);
// remove:  Api.RemoveHideoutTraders(sessionId, ["<trader mongo id>"]);
```

For Fence specifically there is a global config switch (`AddFenceToHideout`) that makes Fence reachable from **any** hideout — see [CONFIG.md](CONFIG.md#trader--economy). The 7 vanilla traders that ship a join-hideout quest also populate this set automatically on quest completion.

---

## Session State

| Method | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `VagabondSessionState? GetState(string sessionId)` | Returns the profile's session state. `null` if profile has none or it's not yet available. |
| `void SaveState(string sessionId, VagabondSessionState state)` | Persists the session state to disk. |

```csharp
var state = Api.GetState(sessionId);
if (state != null)
{
    state.CurrentMap = nameof(RaidLocation.Woods);
    state.LastExit   = "MYMOD_EXT_FENCE";
    Api.SaveState(sessionId, state);
}
```
